description_long: This axe features a robust, dark wooden handle with a slightly curved and segmented design, providing a secure grip. The head of the axe is large and angular, with a metallic blade that has a broad, flat cutting edge and a polygonal rear section. The blade is accented by a striking green, translucent geometric element embedded in the poll, giving it a modern or possibly fantasy-inspired appearance. The handle appears to be reinforced at the top and bottom, with visible texturing that mimics natural wood grain. The overall construction suggests durability and a blend of traditional and contemporary design elements. The axe is visually striking, with a combination of wood, metal, and colored synthetic materials.
description: A modern, fantasy-inspired axe with a dark wooden handle, a broad metallic blade, and a green geometric accent at the rear.
description_view_0: The axe is shown from a three-quarter angle, highlighting the green geometric accent and the broad, flat blade.
description_view_1: A top-down view reveals the circular cross-section of the handle and the polygonal shape of the axe head.
description_view_2: This side view emphasizes the full length of the blade and the layered construction of the handle.
description_view_3: A rear view showcases the green geometric element and the symmetrical mounting of the blade to the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved, segmented wooden handle with a round cross-section and visible grain, designed for ergonomic grip.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, flat, polygonal steel blade with a single cutting edge and a geometric green accent at the poll.
attribute_mounting_style: Modern composite mounting with the blade embedded and reinforced into the handle.
